title: Kenneth Parkhill
compiled_truth: Kenneth Parkhill is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-12-01 to 2002-01-03), Kenneth Parkhill sent 19 and received 123 emails, totalling 142 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (14), [Christie Patrick](people/christie-patrick) (6), [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (5), [Bob Lee](people/bob-lee) (4), [Ghoshr](people/ghoshr-rice) (4).
